title: Application for Upgrading to Regular License. Within three (3) months
content: 40 before the expiration of the provisional license, or at any time during its validity upon 41 deployment of seventy-five (75) seafarers, except fishers, to its new principal/market/s, 42 the agency may apply for upgrading to a regular license upon submission of 43 documents/requirements as hereunder prescribed: 44 45 a. DMW Standard Quality Management System (QMS) Manual or applicable ISO 46 Certification; 47 48 b. Updated bank certificate stating that the escrow deposit remains at One Million 49 Five Hundred Thousand Pesos (PhP1,500,000.00); 50 51 c. Certificate of no pending case or any substantiated adverse report during the 52 validity of the provisional license; 53 54 d. Certificate of Attendance to the Continuing Agency Education Program (CAEP) of 55 all its officers and operations staff involved in the recruitment and placement of 56 seafarers, and Heads of Administration or Accounting Department; and 57 58 e. Latest audited financial statement. 59 60 14 The Department, in accordance with law and after consultation with the stakeholders, 1 may modify the list or prescribe additional requirements for upgrading of license. 2 3
